title: An Atlas of DRAGNs
full_text:
An Atlas of DRAGNs 

We present radio images and other data for the nearest 85 DRAGNs 
(radio galaxies and related objects) in the so-called "3CRR" 
sample of Laing, Riley & Longair (1983). 

Index

Last modified: 2013 October 15

J. P. Leahy

jpl@jb.man.ac.uk
